description_long: This is a compact, single-burner induction cooker with a square metallic body and rounded edges. The cooktop features a prominent black coil heating element protected by a raised metal guard. On the front face, there is a large black rotary knob for adjusting the heat, accompanied by a small indicator light and a yellow caution triangle. The sides are vented for heat dissipation, and the rear has a visible power cord with a standard plug. The overall finish is metallic gray with black accents, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance suitable for portable or temporary cooking setups.
description: A compact, metallic single-burner induction cooker with a black coil, rotary knob, and visible power cord.
description_view_0: Side view showing the power cord extending from the back and the vented side panel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the power cord attachment and the back venting.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the power cord looped and the vented side panel visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rotary control knob, indicator light, and caution triangle.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face, featuring a single large rotary knob on the right, a small round indicator light to its left, and a yellow caution triangle label. No other buttons or touch areas are visible.
